title: String plus interval result in program errors upon comparison
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIMESTAMP, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_dates (event_time, description) VALUES ('1970-01-01 11:00', 'Initial event');
SELECT event_time, event_time - INTERVAL '600 seconds' AS adjusted_time FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM test_dates WHERE event_time = '1970-01-01 11:00' - INTERVAL '600 seconds';
SELECT id FROM test_dates WHERE event_time IS NULL OR event_time > '1970-01-01 10:00';
key_bug_features: String and interval comparison causes program errors
